__READ_ME__: Batch scan grouped seed targets from ../data/seed_target_table.csv. query_name from that file is used as a substring match against screening_super_full ITEMS, so it automatically walks through qualities, StatTrak, Souvenir and other exact market names that contain the query.
__WRITE_MODE_COMMENT__: create = delete previous output/progress and start fresh; merge = append new finished queries into existing output.
__SKIP_COMPLETED_COMMENT__: When true in merge mode, already completed query_name values from output/progress CSV are skipped.
__QUERY_SUBSTRING_COMMENT__: Optional filter over query_name values from seed_target_table.csv before the batch starts.
__MAX_QUERIES_COMMENT__: Optional hard cap on how many query_name rows from the target table to process this run.
__LIMIT_COMMENT__: Size of one Steam /render/ page request. Steam effectively caps it around 100.
__MAX_LISTINGS_COMMENT__: Max total listings to fetch per exact market_hash_name. Lower value = fewer requests and lower 429 risk.
__TIMING__: These timing knobs are forwarded into an embedded Steam runtime if steam_runtime is empty.
__STEAM_CURRENCY_COMMENT__: Wallet currency id used in Steam responses. 3 = EUR.
__REQUEST_TIMEOUT_COMMENT__: Max seconds to wait for one HTTP request before considering it failed.
__RETRY_ATTEMPTS_COMMENT__: How many times to retry the same failed request.
__RETRY_SLEEP_COMMENT__: Random pause range between retries of the same failed request.
__DELAY_BETWEEN_SKINS_COMMENT__: Random pause range between different exact Steam market_hash_name items.
__DELAY_BETWEEN_PAGES_COMMENT__: Random pause range between start=0,100,200... pages of the same item.
__FLOAT_PRECISION_COMMENT__: How many decimal places to keep when float values are returned.
__ASSET_JSON_COMMENT__: 1 = keep raw asset_properties_json in output, 0 = lighter CSV.
__STEAM_RUNTIME_COMMENT__: Leave empty to make this batch JSON fully control timings. If you set a path here, that external steam runtime overrides the local timing settings above.
